app.title: One Page Authoring
app.subtitle: For Government Agencies
app.description: One Page authoring system for government agencies

audit.title: Audit Log
audit.description: Security-relevant events: sign-in attempts, create/update/delete actions, etc.

admin.pendingUsersSubtitle: {count, plural, =0 {No one waiting right now} one {# person waiting for approval} other {# people waiting for approval}}
admin.pendingUsersEmpty: No pending registrations at the moment.

pendingApproval.title: Your account is awaiting approval
pendingApproval.body: The account {email} was registered. An admin has been notified automatically. You'll receive a LINE notification once approved.
pendingApproval.hint: Usually under one business day. You can close this page in the meantime.

groups.pageDescription: Members of the same group can view and edit each other's OnePages. Only owners can delete. Cross-owner edits are always logged.
groups.createDescription: Name the group; add members in the next step.
groups.editDescription: Rename or update the group description.
groups.emptyHint: No groups yet — click "Create group" to organise teammates.
groups.deleteConfirmDescription: Delete group "{name}"? Members will lose shared access to each other's OnePages. The OnePages themselves are not deleted.

templates.pageDescription: Save the values you fill in most often (logos, agency name, slogan…) so new One Pages start half-done.
templates.saveDescription: Capture the current form values for reuse on future One Pages.
templates.systemFlag: Make this a system template (visible to everyone)
templates.systemFlagHint: Admin only — the template will be selectable by every user.
templates.pickerDescription: Start blank, or pick a saved template.
templates.emptyHint: No templates yet — create one via "Save as template" in the One Page editor.
templates.editDescription: Rename or update description — to change the template content, re-save from the One Page editor.
templates.deleteConfirmDescription: Delete template "{name}"? This does not affect One Pages already created from it.

auth.lineLoginNote: Requires an existing account whose email matches your LINE profile
auth.lineErrorNoUser: No account in the system matches this LINE email — contact your administrator
auth.lineErrorNoEmail: This LINE account did not share an email and cannot be linked
auth.lineErrorInactive: Account is inactive — contact your administrator
auth.errorConfiguration: The sign-in service had a temporary problem — please try again
auth.lineLinkedDesc: Your account is linked to LINE — use the "Sign in with LINE" button on the login page
auth.lineUnlinkedDesc: Not linked yet — click to link a LINE account whose email is {email}
auth.lineNotifyOptedInDesc: You'll receive a notification when someone edits your doc or a plan deadline approaches (no doc content is sent over LINE)
auth.lineNotifyOptInDesc: Add the Official Account as a friend on LINE to receive notifications (we only send a link back into the app, never the doc content)
auth.lineNotifyNotConfigured: LINE Official Account is not configured yet
auth.lineSetupSubtitle: Both steps are required, in order, before LINE can deliver notifications to you.
auth.lineSetupStep1Desc: Sign in with LINE once so the system can identify you on LINE
auth.lineSetupStep2: Add the OA as a friend
auth.lineSetupStep2Desc: Add the Official Account on LINE to start receiving messages
auth.lineSetupStep2Blocked: Finish step 1 first before you can add the OA
auth.lineLinkConfirm: You will be redirected to LINE — use the LINE account whose email is {email}; any other LINE account will be treated as a different user.

onepage.title: One Page Title
onepage.crossOwnerEditHint: Edited by a group teammate (not the owner)

form.deadlineHint: Set this when you want a LINE reminder 24 hours before the due date

onepage.autosaveConflict: This doc was edited elsewhere. Reload before saving.
onepage.draftRecoverPrompt: Unsaved work from {when} was found. Recover it?

image.dragDrop: Drag & drop or click to choose
image.cropDescription: Adjust aspect ratio, zoom and rotation

users.title: User Management
users.dialogDescription: Fill in user info and assign a role

profile.title: My Profile
profile.samePassword: New password must differ from the current one

password.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
password.missingLowercase: Must contain at least one lowercase letter (a-z)
password.missingUppercase: Must contain at least one uppercase letter (A-Z)
password.missingDigit: Must contain at least one digit (0-9)
password.invalid: Password does not meet the requirements
password.hint: At least 8 characters including uppercase, lowercase and a digit

upload.typeNotAllowed: File type not allowed (only PNG / JPEG / WebP)

form.logoFreeNote: Choose "Free" to keep the logo uncropped
form.logoSpecRecommended: 400 × 400 px or larger for crisp print output
form.logoSpecAspect: Aspect ratio: any — both logos auto-align to the same height
form.agencyNamePlaceholder: Armed Forces Development Command, Royal Thai Armed Forces HQ
form.subAgencyPlaceholder: By Support Office, Armed Forces Development Command
form.dateHelpText: Pick a date → auto-generate the line (B.E. + weekday)
form.contentPlaceholder: On this date... by... organized the activity...
form.sloganNote: Use · or / between words — they render as blue dots

metrics.title: Baseline metrics
metrics.subtitle: Last {days} days overview (used for pre-rollout comparison)
metrics.linePending: Not enabled yet — pending next milestone
metrics.foot: Source: AuditLog ({loginTotal} login successes in window)
metrics.summaryPlaceholder: e.g. user reports PNG export with broken fonts
